title: Ultimate Pillowy Dutch Tomato Skillet
description: A hearty and flavorful Dutch dish featuring confit tomatoes, dark rum, and herbal notes, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly recipe is cooked to perfection in a cast-iron skillet.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large cast-iron skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and saute for 1 minute.
Add the chopped fresh basil and cook for an additional minute.
Add the ripe tomatoes, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the dark rum and ayurvedic ghee, and stir to combine.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the Ultimate Pillowy Dutch Tomato Skillet hot, garnished with additional fresh basil if desired.
